mechanism: Generative Transformer pretraining followed by supervised transfer
interface_shift: Pretraining turns unlabeled text into reusable language representations
caveat: Use as a mechanism milestone; not a consumer-product claim.

mechanism: Larger web-trained language model with unsupervised multitask behavior
interface_shift: Prompted continuation begins to look like task specification
caveat: Release-strategy debate should be sourced before adding institutional motives.

mechanism: 175B-parameter model evaluated in zero-shot, one-shot, and few-shot settings
interface_shift: Examples inside the prompt become a temporary task program
caveat: Avoid treating scale alone as the story; exact downstream adoption requires snapshots.

mechanism: Hosted text-in/text-out access to OpenAI models
interface_shift: The model becomes a callable infrastructure service
caveat: API terms, pricing, and usage history need same-date captures before charting.

mechanism: Code-trained language model evaluated for functional correctness
interface_shift: Prompts can produce executable artifacts, not only prose
caveat: HumanEval and benchmark comparisons require harness caveats.

mechanism: Codex-powered technical preview in Visual Studio Code
interface_shift: The LLM appears at the developer cursor as an ambient assistant
caveat: Productivity, adoption, legal, and licensing claims require triangulation.
